## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [Agents.md](../Agents.md)
- [ ] Design tokens come from `design-system.md` (no arbitrary colors or spacing)
- [ ] Email/document templates use Elements hierarchy (`Row` → `Column` → content)
- [ ] No Tailwind or shadcn classes inside `<Email>` / `<Document>` trees
- [ ] Copy is realistic (no lorem ipsum or TODO placeholders)
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run smoke` pass locally
- [ ] New templates are registered in `src/lib/templates.ts` and preview correctly
